subcategory: WebGL image effect with mouse-reactive ripple distortion
use_cases: Interactive hero section with mouse-reactive ripple distortion on images
Product showcase with fluid wave effects responding to cursor movement
Landing page visual enhancement with immersive 3D image distortion
Creative portfolio component with animated shader-based transitions
E-commerce product images with engaging hover-triggered ripple animations
ai_summary: A Three.js-based WebGL component that renders images with a real-time ripple distortion effect emanating from the mouse position. Uses custom GLSL shaders with sine wave calculations to create fluid, physics-inspired distortions that animate based on configurable frequency, amplitude, and speed parameters. The component initializes a WebGL renderer with antialiasing, sets up an orthographic camera, and manages a continuous animation loop for smooth rendering. Ideal for creating immersive, interactive visual experiences on landing pages, hero sections, or product showcases where dynamic motion effects enhance user engagement.
